title: Update Desi Mango 10 kg box price to ₹350 in PreOrderForm

requirements.text: In PreOrderForm.tsx, update the Desi Mango 10 kg box variant price to ₹350 per box. Update the dynamic total price calculation so that when 'Desi Mango' is selected with '10 kg box' packaging, the price used is ₹350 per box × quantity. Update the pre-filled WhatsApp message to reflect ₹350 per box for Desi Mango 10 kg box orders. The Desi Mango 5 kg box (₹200 per box), Kesar Mango 5 kg box, and Kesar Mango 10 kg box pricing must remain unchanged.

quotes: change the desi mango - 10kg variant price to 350rs please

acceptanceCriteria: When 'Desi Mango' and '10 kg box' are selected, the dynamic total price displays ₹350 × quantity.
The pre-filled WhatsApp message sent on form submission correctly states ₹350 per box for Desi Mango 10 kg box orders.
Desi Mango 5 kg box price remains ₹200 per box with no change.
Kesar Mango pricing (both 5 kg and 10 kg box) remains unchanged.
Total price calculation updates correctly in real time as quantity changes with this combination selected.

constraints: Do not change Desi Mango 5 kg box pricing (₹200 per box).
Do not change Kesar Mango pricing for any box size.
nonGoals: Modifying any other section or component outside PreOrderForm.tsx.
